mnemonics: AGGREGATE: A Group Gathering & Reducing Everything, Getting A Total Estimate
keyPoints: Aggregates process data records and return computed results.
Common aggregate operations include sum, average, max, min, and count.
Aggregation pipelines allow for multi-stage data processing and transformation.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to group data before applying aggregate functions, leading to incorrect totals.
Confusing aggregation (multiple values to one) with projection (selecting fields), which are different operations.
